calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Account Or The Administrator'S First Interim Account.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martha Bridegam and Laurie Shigekuni for and with Louis Garett Sr., petitioner (via zoom).

Counsel reports that progress has been made since the last filing and assures the Court that a petition for final distribution will be filed shortly.

The Court denies counsel's request for special setting of an anticipated petition for final distribution, advising counsel that the clerk will assign a hearing date when the petition is filed.

Counsel reports that $10,000 payments to the sole beneficiary Stephanie Gaines were for her maintenance as a dependent child, referring to her eligibility for public benefits and first party special needs trust, and were not unauthorized preliminary distribution made without prior court approval. The Court suggests to counsel that the family allowance issue be addressed in the petition for final distribution.

Counsel confirms the administrator's intent to petition for final distribution on waiver of account after meeting with the beneficiary and her counsel Mercy Hall.

The Court denies the status petition, pointing out to counsel that the petition requesting to keep this estate open until June 5, 2026 is now moot. The Court advises counsel that the administrator must file a first interim account covering a 2-year period from the date of death in January 2022, if the beneficiary does not waive accountings.

The Court sets a new status hearing for August 19, 2026 on the filing of a petition for final distribution on waiver of account or the administrator's first interim account.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
